ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
name: fastavro
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: fastavro
  version: "1.12.2"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/${{ name }}-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 3c79502d56cf6b76210032e1c53494ddfbc73c140bccf2ef4092b3f0825323ab

build:
  number: 1
  script:
    env:
      FASTAVRO_USE_CYTHON: "1"
    content: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . --no-deps --no-build-isolation -vv
  python:
    entry_points:
      - fastavro = fastavro.__main__:main

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - cython
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
  host:
    - python
    - cython
    - pip
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - fastavro
      pip_check: true

about:
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Fast read/write of AVRO files
  homepage: https://github.com/fastavro/fastavro
  repository: https://github.com/fastavro/fastavro

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - mariusvniekerk
    - scottbelden
    - tebeka
    - fhoehle
